header: Ship your next TYPO3 site in weeks, not months
subheadline: 244 ready content elements, 15 runtime theme presets, dark mode, and WCAG 2.2-checked contrast — installed with one composer command. Start free under GPL-2.0, go Pro for €49/month when you want the creators at your back.
